item.title: This Rom Com Is A Cringefest, And Proud Of It
item.description: A playful take on a rom-com that leans into the cringe and somehow makes it work.

media:content.media:title: This Rom Com Is A Cringefest, And Proud Of It
media:content.media:description: A playful take on a rom-com that leans into the cringe and somehow makes it work.

item.title: Finally Watched War Of The Worlds
item.description: A quick take on the new War of the Worlds after finally pressing play.

media:content.media:title: Finally Watched War Of The Worlds
media:content.media:description: A quick take on the new War of the Worlds after finally pressing play.
